testcase.name: test_update_status_invalid_order
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_driver_push_iter58.py:131: in test_update_status_invalid_order assert response.status_code == 404 E assert 403 == 404 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_status_invalid_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_driver_push_iter58.py:142: in test_update_status_invalid_status assert response.status_code in [400, 404] E assert 403 in [400, 404] E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_status_valid_statuses

failure.message: AssertionError: Status 'pending' should be valid assert 403 == 404 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_driver_push_iter58.py:156: in test_update_status_valid_statuses assert response.status_code == 404, f"Status '{status}' should be valid" E AssertionError: Status 'pending' should be valid E assert 403 == 404 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_root_endpoint
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_driver_push_iter58.py:253: in test_root_endpoint print(f"Root endpoint: {response.json()}") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
